embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

raw_data.content:
when user progress accruac streka or dialy strkea not ssiny on thre ocniged milstone channel which is anoinyg i think somtu during closed day it does this etc

Investigate this issue deeply and figure out why the milestone ping channel, when someone goes up in a daily streak or increases their accuracy streak or hits a milestone threshold, or when they rank up, is not sending. Why is that not sending in the thing saying "User has done that"? In the milestone set channel, why is that not sending when that event happens?

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s
